channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former Navy Sailor Accused of Supporting ISIS Plot to Kill American Troops
THE ESSEX FILES: The New Battle for the West - Pete Hegseth Brings Uncomfortable Truths to Normandy
Noncitizens on Voter Rolls in Democrat-Run State Exposed as RNC Chair Pledges Secure Elections
item.description: Noncitizens were found on New Jersey voter rolls for years, with some voting in prior elections, according to RNC and NJGOP documents.

item.title: House Democrats Plan to Investigate Trump
item.description: House Democrats are preparing to investigate what they consider crimes committed by the Trump administration. Rep. Jared...
